title: Get-CableLossCompensation
description: Gets the Reader Cable Loss Compensation. Includes Cable Length and Cable Loss per Hundred Feet. (Not applicable to ATR7000 readers)

command.description: The value for the key command must be get_cableLossCompensation

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: get_cableLossCompensation_command
payload.description: Gets the Reader Cable Loss Compensation. Includes Cable Length and Cable Loss per Hundred Feet. (Not applicable to ATR7000 readers)
